creator: bootsy52@gmx.net
text:
This happened to me as well today,
running FreeBSD 7.2 Release on AMD64.

I was doing I/O and I have a large file located on the
raidz1 pool however it is not really reproduciable as the system
ran fine for some days before.

Regards

Carsten

"There are two major products that came out of Berkeley: LSD and UNIX.
   We don't believe this to be a coincidence." --Jeremy S. Anderson
